---
applyTo: "**"
description: "Route every AzureRM pull request and code change review through the azurerm-code-review skill."
---

# AzureRM code review routing

For every code review task, regardless of the changed file type, read and follow:

- `.github/skills/azurerm-code-review/SKILL.md`

Apply the skill to every changed file in the authoritative review scope. The skill owns review methodology, evidence requirements, path-based contributor-guide loading, local review safeguards, and final finding classification.

Do not review from general model knowledge alone. Current repository contributor guidance and changed-code evidence are mandatory inputs.
